name: Old-Fashioned Sage Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef lightly with eggs, rolled oats, onion, applesauce, salt, pepper, and sage until well-blended.
2. Pack firmly into a loaf pan (9x5x3 inches).
3. Unmold into a shallow baking pan.
4. Score the top in a criss-cross pattern.
5. Brush with steak sauce.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees Fahrenheit) for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until brown.
